phase_title: Phase Report Trust Gate Hard-Fail / Push-Check Integration
summary: Made incomplete phase reports lifecycle-blocking: pcae phase complete now hard-fails by default when report trust is incomplete/invalid (with --allow-partial-report opt-out that still never dispatches Telegram for a partial report); pcae push check gained a content-completeness phase_report_trust gate that deliberately excludes push-state fields to avoid deadlocking the normal task-finish-then-push sequence; pcae task finish --commit unchanged (warning-only pre-push, per 105C.1). 29 new tests. Recommends 106A.

phase_commits.message: Integrate phase report trust hard fail

note: Corrected dispatch, sent after pcae push resolved final push state. The earlier pcae task finish --commit run for this same phase correctly reported skipped_incomplete instead of dispatching partial (demonstrating 105C.1's preserved behavior), and pcae push check correctly passed despite the pre-push report (demonstrating 105D's deliberate content-only push-check gate).
no_go_confirmation: No runtime enforcement. No autonomous execution. No real backend invocation. No adapter execution. No subprocess execution beyond existing lifecycle/test command behavior. No shell execution beyond existing lifecycle/test command behavior. No network call outside the existing Telegram outbound notification path. No shell interception. No Telegram inbound. No Telegram polling. No remote shell. No automatic apply. No apply execution. No patch parsing. No commit authorization changes beyond existing governed lifecycle. No push authorization changes beyond existing governed lifecycle. No real AI backend calls. No executable artifact-only invocation path. No execution enablement flag. No execution availability toggle. No cryptographic signing. No remote attestation. No database-backed audit storage. No shell mediation. No rollback execution. No file mutation rollback. No automatic restore. No git reset/checkout/revert execution. Telegram outbound-only. Execution unavailable. All auth flags False. Incomplete reports cannot pass final trust gates. Recommends 106A.
